Price

Cabin Number:
Public Areas On Deck 16
Magic Carpet
The size of a tennis court, and reaching heights of 13 stories above sea level, it is the world’s first cantilevered, floating platform. Majestically situated on the starboard side of our Edge Class ships, it is designed with comfortable seating, a full bar, and space for live music performances – so it truly is a destination itself.
The Retreat Sundeck
Exclusive for guests of The Retreat. The luxurious outdoor area rivals any high-end resort, featuring a spacious lounge area, plush, stylish furniture, and an inviting pool and hot tub.
The Retreat Pool Bar
Suite Class guests enjoy exclusive access to the indulgent, inviting Pool Bar with private cabanas and plush loungers.

You have selected a handicap accessible stateroom.
